steps.title: Map the relationship
steps.content: The first sentence claims the installation "succeeds in creating a whimsical yet perplexing experience." The sentence after the blank gives a concrete instance — visitors are "both dazzled and confused" — which confirms and intensifies that claim.

steps.title: Pick the transition
steps.content: A transition that affirms/intensifies a prior claim is needed. "Indeed" signals exactly that confirming emphasis.

steps.title: Per-choice elimination
steps.content:
• Choice A — Second,: signals the next item in a list, but no "first" point was made. ✗
  • Choice B — Instead,: signals replacement/contrast, but the second sentence agrees with the first. ✗
  • Choice C — Indeed,: confirms and intensifies the prior claim — exactly the relationship here. ✓
  • Choice D — Nevertheless,: signals contrast, but no contrast exists. ✗
That matches Choice C — Indeed,.
